sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78115" key="parakataqete/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρακατα-θετέον</orth>, <sense id="n78115.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must entrust</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῷ λόγῳ τὸν βίον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Socr.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1.73</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
